description: Address v2 code review issues: UNIQUE constraint on api_keys.key, unbounded request_log, hardcoded Pricing page, rate limit scope, and duplicate getJwtSecret.
steps: Remove UNIQUE constraint from api_keys.key column in schema.ts (key_hash is now the lookup column)
Add index on (user_id, timestamp) for request_log; add cleanup function for rows older than 48 hours, called on startup and every hour
Update Pricing.tsx to fetch tier data from GET /api/tiers instead of hardcoding limits
Apply tierRateLimit only to POST/DELETE (mutation) endpoints, not GET endpoints in whatsapp and messages routers
Extract getJwtSecret() to server/src/utils/jwt.ts and import in both middleware/auth.ts and services/auth.service.ts
acceptance_criteria: api_keys.key column has no UNIQUE constraint, allowing multiple keys with empty string value
request_log has an index on (user_id, timestamp) and rows older than 48 hours are cleaned periodically
Pricing.tsx fetches and renders real tier limits from /api/tiers
GET requests to /api/whatsapp and /api/messages do not consume rate limit budget
getJwtSecret exists in a single shared utility and is imported by both auth.ts and auth.service.ts
